guideMessages.intro: Woof! I'm Bruno. I have some magic to show you today.
guideMessages.wishScreen: The stars are listening... make a wish.
guideMessages.cakeScreen: A cake made of dreams! Blow the candles and cut a slice.
guideMessages.letterScreen: A letter from the heart, just for you. 💌

letterTemplate: On this special day, I want to take a moment to admire the incredible person you are becoming. Your strength, your kindness, and your light do not go unnoticed.
Life is a journey of blooming, and you are blossoming into something truly magnificent. Even on the days when the climb feels steep, remember that you have mountains of courage within you.
Don't ever let anyone dim your sparkle. You have a unique gift to offer the world, and this year is your canvas to paint it with bold, beautiful colors.
Keep chasing those dreams that set your soul on fire. You are capable of more than you know, and worthy of all the happiness in the universe.
Happy Birthday! Use this year to fly higher than ever before.
